scripts.clean: rimraf android/app/build && rimraf ios/build && rimraf node_modules && rimraf .expo && rimraf .expo-shared && rimraf package-lock.json && rimraf yarn.lock
scripts.bundle-android: npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res
scripts.bundle-ios: npx react-native bundle --platform ios --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output ios/main.jsbundle --assets-dest ios
